pricing_policy: Website package prices are starting points. Final scope is confirmed after a free strategy call. Work outside the three website packages, including ads setup or advanced automation, receives a custom quote.

offers.name: Website Starter
offers.best_for: Single-service businesses needing a professional online presence.
includes: One-page website or focused landing page

offers.name: Lead Generation Website
offers.best_for: Service businesses that want more enquiries from their website.

offers.name: Industry Demo-Style Website
offers.best_for: Businesses that want a premium website similar to the live demos.

pilot_offer: Two discounted paid pilot projects are available for suitable UK service businesses that agree to honest feedback and approved case-study documentation.
guardrails: Do not invent exact custom prices.
Do not guarantee revenue, lead volume, conversion rates or cost savings.
Explain that ad spend is separate.
Recommend the free strategy call when scope is unclear.
